case_title: DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. VS. FARZAD DEFAEE et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. ON DEFENDANT DEFAEE, FARZAD INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DONYA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL DOES 1-20

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEFAEE, FARZAD INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DONYA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 391 SUTTER STREET, STE 701, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94108, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT ORIGINAL LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT DEFAEE, FARZAD INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DONYA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $193.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DEFAEE, FARZAD INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DONYA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEFAEE, FARZAD INDIVIDUALLY AND DOING BUSINESS AS DONYA INTERNATIONAL TRAVEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON MAR-7-05 $415.00 RENT, $400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $193.30 COSTS, $147.42 INTEREST & LATE CHANGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,155.72, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.83 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS (SUMMARY) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DYNASTY PROPERTIES COMPANY LTD.
